no_parking.claim: Parking is not available at the official shuttle locations; only ticketed fans may board.
no_parking.label: FIFA — Know Before You Go, Miami

shuttle_window.claim: Free shuttles run from rail hubs from 3.5h pre-match to 1.5h post.
shuttle_window.label: FIFA — Miami

ticketholder_only.claim: Only fans with a ticket to that day's match may board the buses.
ticketholder_only.label: FIFA — Miami

transit_encouraged.claim: Miami-Dade mobility plan: free ticketholder shuttle service; transit strongly encouraged.
transit_encouraged.label: Miami Host Committee

copa_2024.claim: The 2024 Copa America final at Hard Rock had a dangerous crowd crush.
copa_2024.label: CBS News Miami
